title: Elsabé Daneel's Tomato Bredie
excerpt: My tomato bredie that I made for Elsabé Daneel in the first episode of Stoofstories with Marinda, on VIA DStv channel 147, Wednesdays at 17:00.

seo.title: Elsabé Daneel's Tomato Bredie - Marinda Kook

html: My tomato bredie that I made for Elsabé Daneel in the first episode of Stoofstories with Marinda, on VIA DStv channel 147, Wednesdays at 17:00.

items: 15 ml oil to fry the onions in
2 kg mixed lamb neck and lamb ribs
5 ml ground ginger (if you don't have any, it's not essential)

steps: Fry the onions until glassy in a pot on the stove.
Fry the meat together with the onions until lightly browned.
Mix the rest of the ingredients, except the potatoes, in a bowl.
Pour it over the meat in the pot and let it simmer gently for 45 minutes.
Peel the potatoes and cut them into quarters.
After the bredie has simmered in the pot for 45 minutes, the potatoes can be added.
Cook now until the potatoes and meat are nice and soft – about 30 minutes (you'll need to taste as you go).
Cook plain white rice to serve it with.
